targets.rawSql:
SELECT page_route,
       COUNT(*) AS calls,
       ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)) AS avg_ms,
       ROUND(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(
         GROUP_CONCAT(duration_ms ORDER BY duration_ms),
         ',', CEIL(0.95 * COUNT(*))), ',', -1)) AS p95_ms
FROM api_request_log
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY page_route
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT page_route, COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM api_request_log
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY page_route
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT target, endpoint,
       COUNT(*) AS calls,
       ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)) AS avg_ms,
       ROUND(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(
         GROUP_CONCAT(duration_ms ORDER BY duration_ms),
         ',', CEIL(0.95 * COUNT(*))), ',', -1)) AS p95_ms
FROM api_request_log
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY target, endpoint
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Endpoints called per page (last 24h, max per visit, 30s gap)

targets.rawSql:
WITH flagged AS (
  SELECT
    session_id, page_route, target, endpoint, duration_ms, ts,
    CASE
      WHEN LAG(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY session_id, page_route ORDER BY ts) IS NULL THEN 1
      WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND,
             LAG(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY session_id, page_route ORDER BY ts),
             ts) > 30 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS new_visit
  FROM api_request_log
  WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
),
visits AS (
  SELECT
    session_id, page_route, target, endpoint, duration_ms,
    SUM(new_visit) OVER (PARTITION BY session_id, page_route
                         ORDER BY ts ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS visit_id
  FROM flagged
),
per_visit AS (
  SELECT session_id, page_route, target, endpoint, visit_id,
         COUNT(*) AS calls,
         SUM(duration_ms) AS dur_sum,
         COUNT(*) AS dur_n
  FROM visits
  GROUP BY session_id, page_route, target, endpoint, visit_id
)
SELECT page_route, target, endpoint,
       MAX(calls) AS max_calls,
       ROUND(SUM(dur_sum)/SUM(dur_n)) AS avg_ms,
       COUNT(*) AS visits_seen
FROM per_visit
GROUP BY page_route, target, endpoint
ORDER BY page_route, max_calls DESC;

SELECT ts, page_route, target, endpoint, method, status, duration_ms, server_ms
FROM api_request_log
WHERE session_id = '$session_id'
  AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
ORDER BY ts;

list.name: session_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM api_request_log WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100;
list.label: Session
